profileSettings.dangerZoneDesc: Deactivating will lock your profile and end your sessions.
profileSettings.deleteHint: Deletes your account and related data. If linked accounts exist, you’ll return to the home feed; otherwise to sign-in.
profileSettings.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to change settings.

extraPassword.desc: When resetting password, email or phone must also be confirmed.
extraPassword.title: Extra password protection

securityPage.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to manage security settings.

sessions.desc: Ends all active sessions on all devices and logs you out.
sessions.title: End sessions

securityPage.title: Security & access

twofa.intro: Protect your account with a second login step. Use app (TOTP), SMS or passkeys.
twofa.passkeyActiveMsg: Passkey is enabled. You can use it to log in.
twofa.passkeysActiveNote: Passkey is set up and stored for 2FA.
twofa.passkeysNote: Set up a passkey for faster and safer login.
twofa.scanIntro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.

sms.loginSendsToPrefix: When logging in, we send a code to

twofa.smsAddPhoneFirst: Add a phone number in your profile settings first.
twofa.smsPhoneReady: Phone number is saved. You can now set up SMS codes.
twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
